Title: uTPro Simple Form Builder
Description: Lightweight form builder for Umbraco 16, 17 and 18 backoffice. Create, manage, and render dynamic forms with 19+ field types, groups/columns layout, client-side validation, sensitive data encryption, multi-language support, custom field extensibility, entry storage, and public submit/render APIs. Render any form with a single ViewComponent call. Database-agnostic: runs on SQL Server, SQLite and PostgreSQL.

Screenshots.Caption: Forms list — create, filter, edit, entries, export, delete
Visual form builder — groups, 12-column layout and fields
19 built-in field types plus a custom field type extension point
Form settings — success message, redirect, email, opt-in APIs
Rendered form on the front-end with client-side validation
Entries with search, date-range filters, paging and CSV export
Entries encrypted at rest and masked when a field is Sensitive Data
Form Picker data type — restrict to specific Allowed forms
Choosing a form from a content property with the Form Picker
Import / Export form definitions as JSON
Runs on PostgreSQL (and SQL Server / SQLite) — cross-database support
